name: synthetic-routing-demo
purpose: Public-safe proof fixture for Waypoint branded-domain routing and QR flow.

rules: Do not include secrets, cookies, credentials, customer data, personal data, private URLs, production domains, or real QR payloads.

link.title: Example launch
link.description: Synthetic demo link for public documentation.

guidedFlow: Create admin account in a local or throwaway demo database.
Add go.example.test as the primary branded domain.
Create the launch link with destination https://example.com/waypoint-demo.
Confirm the detail panel shows the branded URL and QR preview.
Download the SVG QR code and verify it encodes http://go.example.test/launch.
Confirm /launch on go.example.test redirects to https://example.com/waypoint-demo.
Confirm /r/launch on qr.example.test remains the fallback route.
